title: Automate OAK PR cartography and evidence gates

claim.statement: The repository automatically validates the current Pull Request manifest and evidence while producing a daily advisory registry for all open Pull Requests.
exclusions: The automation does not prove the absence of every vulnerability.
The automation does not merge Pull Requests or enable auto-merge.
falsification_criteria: A Pull Request without a valid manifest passes the blocking gate.
A ledger whose SHA-256 differs from the manifest is accepted.
The scheduled registry modifies repository state or merges a Pull Request.

baseline_comparison.expected: The targeted PR mode, strict schemas, ledger parser and dependency cycle detector pass their tests.

clean_environment_reproduction.expected: The workflow installs pinned dependencies, passes tests, validates PR #233 and publishes the OAK registry artifact.
